patches.hypothesis: The constructor is incorrectly using DEFAULT_TIME_ZONE instead of the provided 'zone' parameter, causing the week calculation to be incorrect based on the wrong time zone.
patches.changes:
- this(time, RegularTimePeriod.DEFAULT_TIME_ZONE, Locale.getDefault());
+ this(time, zone, Locale.getDefault());
patches.diff:
- this(time, RegularTimePeriod.DEFAULT_TIME_ZONE, Locale.getDefault());
+ this(time, zone, Locale.getDefault());
